ORDER OVERRULING DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFFS' FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS TIM WONG AND LINDA WONG'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. THE COMPLAINT IS SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED. DEFENDANTS FAILED TO SHOW THAT THE ENTIRE COMPLAINT IS BARRED (A) BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS UNDER CCP 340(A) OR (B) BY RES JUDICATA. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-09-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Lan Nguyen Fulerton, Esq. (415-956-6488 x14) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Yuan Yang Wu.
No other Appearance.

Plaintiff submits to the tentative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS TIM WONG and LINDA WONG's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. The complaint is sufficiently alleged. Defendants failed to show that the entire complaint is barred (a) by the statute of limitations under CCP 340(a) or (b) by res judicata. Order is signed in open court. (see scanned order for details) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
